description: Use this API routine to run the QV analysis calculation engine. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.4.0. ierr = qv_engine_4(options, values, label, dfxfile, thrfile, inlfile, accfile, zipfile)
python_syntax: ierr = qv_engine_4(options, values, label, dfxfile, thrfile, inlfile, accfile, zipfile)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of thirteen elements specifying solution options. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying solution values. (input).

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: An array of one elements specifying subsystem label. (input).

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Name of dfax file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: thrfile
parameters.description: Name of load throwover data file; blank for none. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: inlfile
parameters.description: Name of inertia and governor response file; blank for none. (input).

parameters.name: accfile
parameters.description: Name of qv results file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: zipfile
parameters.description: Name of zip archive output file. (input).

options.description: tap adjustment flag (tap adjustment option setting by default).
area interchange adjustment flag (area interchange adjustment option setting by default).
enable using tie line flows only in calculating area interchange.
enable using tie line flows and loads in calculating area interchange.
phase shift adjustment flag (phase shift adjustment option setting by default).
dc tap adjustment flag (dc tap adjustment option setting by default).
switched shunt adjustment flag (switched shunt adjustment option setting by default).
enable continuous mode, disable discrete mode.
induction motor treatment flag; applied when an induction motor fails to solve due to low terminal voltage (0 by default).
non-divergent solution flag (non-divergent solution option setting by default).
var limit code for the VHI power flow solution (0 by default).
var limit code for the subsequent voltage decrement cases (0 by default).
dispatch mode for power unbalances resulting from the application of contingencies (1 by default).
in-service subsystem machines using governor droop.
write ZIP archive flag (0 by default).
Write ZIP Archive file ZIPFILE; preserve each system condition at its lowest solved study bus voltage level.
Write ZIP Archive file ZIPFILE; preserve each system condition at all solved study bus voltage levels.

values.description: mismatch tolerance in MW and Mvar (Newton solution convergence tolerance, TOLN, by default).
initial (maximum) pu voltage setpoint at the study bus (VHI) (1.1 by default).
minimum pu voltage setpoint at the study bus (VLO) (0.9 by default).
pu voltage setpoint decrement (positive) at the study bus (DLTAV) (0.01 by default).

label.description: label of the dispatch subsystem; used if OPTIONS(12) is 1 through 4 (blank by default).

error_codes.description: no error occurred.
invalid VALUES value.
invalid OPTIONS value.
generators are converted.
buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
largest mismatch exceeds mismatch tolerance.
initial transfer increment is less than transfer increment tolerance.
no participating dispatch buses in study system.
no participating dispatch buses in opposing system.
subsystem engine error.
ECDI engine in subsystem aaa.
base case ECDI solution did not converge.
no DFAX file specified.
no PV results file specified.
no economic dispatch data file specified.
in-service induction machines are in the “stalled” or “tripped” state.
bus type code and series element status inconsistencies.
invalid base/contingency case flag combination.
DFXFILE file is not in the form of a PSSE-25 or later DFAX file; run DFAX.
monitored elements exceed limit when adding multi-section line members.
no subsystems defined.
subsystem not found.
specified subsystems overlap.
no in-service buses in subsystem WORLD.
error opening economic dispatch data file.
error opening PV results file.
error opening DFAX file.
error opening load throwover data file.
error opening inertia and governor response data file.
error opening ZIP archive output file.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
terminated by user interrupt or file error.
